metadata.title: Onye Emepụta Koodu QR n'efu – PNG & SVG, Enweghị Ndebanye Aha
metadata.description: Mepụta koodu QR maka peeji weebụ, vCard, ndepụta nri ma ọ bụ akwụkwọ mgbasa ozi na nkeji. Bupụ dịka PNG & SVG. Dozie agba na nha.

hero.title: Onye Emepụta Koodu QR – N'efu, Enweghị Ndebanye Aha
hero.description: Mepụta koodu QR maka weebụsaịtị, kaadị azụmaahịa vCard, email, ekwentị, ma ọ bụ ederede. Dozie agba, nha, na ọkwa ndozi njehie, mgbe ahụ budata faịlụ PNG ma ọ bụ SVG dị njikere.

software.name: Onye emepụta koodu QR n'efu
alternateName: Onye emepụta koodu QR ndepụta nri ụlọ oriri
Koodu QR maka ibipụta PNG SVG
Onye emepụta kaadị azụmaahịa dijitalụ vCard
Onye emepụta koodu QR enweghị ndebanye aha
Onye emepụta koodu QR n'efu enweghị oke
software.description: Mepụta koodu QR maka weebụsaịtị, kaadị azụmaahịa, ndepụta nri, ma ọ bụ akwụkwọ mgbasa ozi. Họrọ ụdị data, dozie agba na nha, mgbe ahụ budata faịlụ PNG ma ọ bụ SVG.
featureList: Koodu QR maka email (adreesị, aha, ọdịnaya)
Agba koodu na ndabere a nwere ike ịdozi

howTo.name: Otu esi eji onye emepụta koodu QR n'efu
howTo.description: Otu esi emepụta koodu QR maka weebụsaịtị, kaadị azụmaahịa vCard, email, ma ọ bụ ekwentị — site na ịhọrọ ụdị data ruo ibudata faịlụ dị njikere maka ibipụta.

steps.name: Họrọ ụdị data
steps.text: Kpebie ihe koodu QR kwesịrị inwe: URL, ederede, kaadị azụmaahịa (vCard), email, ma ọ bụ nọmba ekwentị.

steps.name: Tinye data
steps.text: Kpuchie ubi kwesịrị ekwesị. Maka URL, tinye adreesị peeji; maka vCard, nye nkọwa kpọtụrụ.

steps.name: Dozie ọdịdị
steps.text: Họrọ nha, ókè gburugburu, agba koodu na ndabere, na ọkwa ndozi njehie.

steps.name: Budata koodu
steps.text: Ị nwere ike ibudata koodu QR dị njikere dịka faịlụ PNG (maka ibipụta na weebụ) ma ọ bụ SVG (vector, ọ na-agbasatịe na-enweghị mfu mma).

contentBlocks.title: Gịnị bụ koodu QR na kedu ka ọ si arụ ọrụ?
contentBlocks.html:
Koodu QR (Quick Response) bụ koodu ahịrị abụọ nke a pụrụ inyocha site na kamera ekwentị mkpanaaka. N'adịghị ka koodu ahịrị ọdịnala, koodu QR na-echekwa data n'akụkụ na ogologo, nke na-eme ka ha nwee ike iburu ozi karịa — ruo ihe dịka mkpụrụedemede-nọmba 3,000.

Emepụtara koodu QR na 1994 site n'aka ụlọ ọrụ Japan Denso Wave (akụkụ nke otu Toyota) maka ịchọpụta akụkụ ụgbọala. Taa, a na-eji koodu QR n'ọtụtụ ebe na mgbasa ozi, ọrụ ọbịa, mkpokọta ihe, na nkwurịta ọnụ azụmaahịa. Ha ghọrọ nke a ma ama karịsịa n'oge ọrịa COVID-19, mgbe ụlọ oriri malitere iji koodu QR dochie ndepụta nri ebipụtara.

contentBlocks.title: Otu esi eji onye emepụta koodu QR n'efu
contentBlocks.description: Ịmepụta koodu QR na-ewe naanị nkeji ole na ole:

items.title: 1. Họrọ ụdị data
items.description: Họrọ ihe ị chọrọ ịkwakọba: URL, ederede, kaadị azụmaahịa vCard, email, ma ọ bụ nọmba ekwentị.

items.title: 2. Tinye data
items.description: Kpuchie ubi kwesịrị ekwesị — adreesị peeji, nkọwa kpọtụrụ, ma ọ bụ ọdịnaya ozi.

items.title: 3. Budata koodu
items.description: Dozie ọdịdị (agba, nha, ókè gburugburu) wee budata dịka PNG ma ọ bụ SVG.

contentBlocks.title: Ụdị koodu QR — URL, vCard, email, ekwentị, ederede
contentBlocks.description: Onye emepụta koodu QR n'efu na-akwado ụdị data ise — nke ọ bụla bara uru n'ọnọdụ dị iche iche:

items.title: URL
items.description: Njikọ gaa peeji weebụ. Mgbe anyochachara, ekwentị na-emeghe peeji na ihe nchọgharị. Zuru ezu maka kaadị azụmaahịa, akwụkwọ mgbasa ozi, na akwụkwọ mgbasa ozi.

items.title: Ederede
items.description: Ederede ọ bụla ruo mkpụrụedemede 3,000. Mgbe anyochachara, ekwentị na-egosi ederede na ihuenyo. Ọ bara uru maka kupọọnụ ọnụahịa na ntụziaka mkpụmkpụ.

items.title: Kaadị azụmaahịa vCard
items.description: Kaadị azụmaahịa dijitalụ nwere data kpọtụrụ (aha, ụlọ ọrụ, ekwentị, email, adreesị). Mgbe anyochachara, ekwentị na-enye ohere ịchekwa kọntaktị. Zuru ezu maka kaadị azụmaahịa ọkachamara.

items.title: Email
items.description: Adreesị email nwere aha na ọdịnaya nke abụghị nke achọrọ. Mgbe anyochachara, ekwentị na-emeghe ngwa email nwere fọọmụ ekpuchielara.

items.title: Ekwentị
items.description: Nọmba ekwentị. Mgbe anyochachara, ekwentị na-enye ohere ịkpọ oku. Ọ bara uru maka ahịrị ọkụ na nkwado ndị ahịa.

contentBlocks.title: Nkọwa teknụzụ koodu QR
contentBlocks.demoHtml:
Ikikeruo mkpụrụedemede 4,296
Ndozi njehie7% – 30%
Nha ibipụta kachasị nta2 × 2 cm
Ọdịiche kachasị nta3:1
Ókè gburugburuọ dịkarịa ala modulu 4
contentBlocks.html:
Ịmata nkọwa teknụzụ na-enyere gị aka ịmepụta koodu QR a pụrụ ịgụ n'ọnọdụ niile:

  • Ikike data — koodu QR nwere ike iburu ruo nọmba 7,089, mkpụrụedemede-nọmba 4,296, ma ọ bụ byte 2,953 nke data binary. N'omume, nke a kwuru nke ọma maka URL na kaadị azụmaahịa.
  • Ndozi njehie Reed-Solomon — algorithm ọtụtụ na-eme ka a pụrụ ịgụ koodu ọ bụrụgodị na akụkụ ya mere ihe ma ọ bụ kpuchiri. Ọkwa: L (7%), M (15%), Q (25%), H (30%).
  • Ókè gburugburu — mpaghara ọcha gburugburu koodu achọrọ maka inyocha nke ọma. Nke a tụrụ aro kachasị nta bụ modulu 4 (akụkụ koodu).
  • Nha ibipụta kachasị nta — maka ọnọdụ inyocha nkịtị, koodu kwesịrị ịdị ọ dịkarịa ala 2×2 cm. Maka ibipụta nha ukwuu (ọkọlọtọ, pátákó mgbasa ozi), mee nha ukwuu kwa.
  • Ọdịiche — ọnụọgụ ọdịiche n'etiti koodu na ndabere kwesịrị ịdị ọ dịkarịa ala 3:1. Onye emepụta ahụ na-adọ aka ná ntị na-akpaghị aka gbasara ọdịiche dị obere.

contentBlocks.title: Ojiji koodu QR — kaadị azụmaahịa, akwụkwọ mgbasa ozi, ndepụta nri ụlọ oriri
contentBlocks.description: Koodu QR bara uru na ọtụtụ ọrụ na ọnọdụ:

items.title: Kaadị azụmaahịa
items.description: Koodu vCard na kaadị azụmaahịa na-enye onye nnata ohere ịchekwa kọntaktị site n'otu inyocha, na-enweghị ide data n'aka.

items.title: Ndepụta nri ụlọ oriri na kafé
items.description: Koodu QR na tebụl na-eduzi gaa ndepụta nri dijitalụ. Ihe ọma maka nsọ ahụ nke ghọrọ nke a ma ama site na oge COVID-19.

items.title: Akwụkwọ mgbasa ozi na akwụkwọ mgbasa ozi
items.description: Koodu QR nwere njikọ gaa peeji ngwaahịa, fọọmụ ndebanye aha, ma ọ bụ onyinye pụrụ iche.

items.title: Nkwakọba ngwaahịa
items.description: Njikọ gaa ntụziaka onye ọrụ, kaadị nkwenye, ma ọ bụ peeji onye na-emepụta.

items.title: Ọfịs ahụike
items.description: Koodu QR na kaadị onye ọrịa jikọtara na portal onye ọrịa ma ọ bụ usoro ịhazi nzukọ.

items.title: Ụlọ
items.description: Koodu na ọkọlọtọ jikọtara na ndepụta zuru ezu nwere ụlọ nkwakọba onyonyo na nkọwa.

items.title: Ụlọ nchekwa na mkpokọta ihe
items.description: Akara QR maka ịchọpụta otu ngwaahịa, ọnọdụ ụlọ nchekwa, na akụkọ mbugharị.

items.title: Azụmaahịa weebụ
items.description: Koodu na nkwakọba jikọtara na ntụziaka nweghachi, nyocha ndị ahịa, ma ọ bụ usoro nkwụnye ụgwọ.

items.title: Mmemme na nzukọ
items.description: Tiketi nwere koodu QR maka nkwenye ngwa ngwa n'ọnụ ụzọ.

contentBlocks.title: Ịdozi ọdịdị koodu QR
contentBlocks.demoHtml:
Nha300 px
Ókè gburugburu4
Agba koodu
Agba ndabere
contentBlocks.html:
Onye emepụta ahụ na-enye gị ohere ịdozi nkọwa ọtụtụ nke na-emetụta ọdịdị na ịgụta koodu:

  • Nha (px) — nha koodu na pixel. Maka ibipụta nkịtị (akwụkwọ mgbasa ozi, kaadị azụmaahịa) họrọ 300–500 px. Maka ojiji dijitalụ, 150–200 px kwuru.
  • Ókè gburugburu — mpaghara ọcha gburugburu koodu achọrọ maka inyocha nke ọma. Uru a tụrụ aro bụ 2–4. Uru 0 nwere ike ime ka inyocha sie ike na ndabere ojii.
  • Agba koodu QR — ojii na ntọala (#000000). Ị nwere ike ịgbanwe ya gaa agba ojii ọ bụla kwekọrọ na ịmata anya gị.
  • Agba ndabere — ọcha na ntọala (#ffffff). Ị nwere ike ịgbanwe ya gaa agba ìhè ọ bụla. Onye emepụta ahụ ga-adọ aka ná ntị ma ọdịiche dị obere.

Ndụmọdụ: Debe ọdịiche dị elu n'etiti koodu na ndabere (ọ dịkarịa ala 3:1). Koodu ojii n'elu ndabere ìhè kachasị mfe inyocha.

contentBlocks.title: Ọkwa ndozi njehie — L, M, Q, H
contentBlocks.demoHtml:
L (Obere)7%
M (Etiti)15%
Q (Otu ụzọ n'ime anọ)25%
H (Elu)30%
contentBlocks.html:
Ndozi njehie bụ usoro na-eme ka a pụrụ ịgụ koodu QR ọ bụrụgodị na akụkụ ya emerela ihe, dị unyi, ma ọ bụ kpuchiri. Onye emepụta ahụ na-eji algorithm Reed-Solomon, nke arụnyere na koodu QR.

  • L (Obere) — 7% — ntinye ọzọ kachasị nta, koodu kachasị dị mfe. Họrọ mgbe a ga-eji koodu n'ọnọdụ dị mma (ihuenyo, ibipụta mma dị elu).
  • M (Etiti) — 15% — uru ntọala, ịha nhata dị mma n'etiti ikike na ịdịgide. Ọ dabara maka ọtụtụ ojiji.
  • Q (Otu ụzọ n'ime anọ) — 25% — ịdịgide karịa mgbe ihe merenụ. Họrọ maka koodu ebipụtara na ihe na-abụkarị unyi.
  • H (Elu) — 30% — ịdịgide kachasị elu. A tụrụ aro maka ihe ebipụtara n'èzí, nkwakọba, na ọnọdụ ebe koodu nwere ike ịkpuchi n'akụkụ (dịka ọmụmaatụ, logo n'etiti).

Mara: Ọkwa ndozi dị elu karịa pụtara koodu dị ukwuu karịa ma siri ike karịa. Nwere data ọtụtụ na ọkwa H, koodu nwere ike ịbụrụ nke buru ibu.

contentBlocks.title: PNG vs SVG — usoro ole ka ị ga-ahọrọ maka ibipụta?

features.name: Akwụkwọ mgbasa ozi na kaadị azụmaahịa
Akwụkwọ mgbasa ozi na ọkọlọtọ (nha ukwuu)

contentBlocks.title: Ndụmọdụ ibipụta koodu QR
contentBlocks.description: Iji hụ na koodu QR pụrụ ịgụ mgbe ebipụtachara, soro iwu ndị a:

items.title: Nha kachasị nta
items.description: Koodu kwesịrị ịdị ọ dịkarịa ala 2×2 cm maka inyocha n'ebe dị nso. Otu ebe inyocha si dị anya, otu koodu ahụ kwesịrị ịdị ukwuu.

items.title: Ọdịiche
items.description: Koodu ojii n'elu ndabere ìhè. Zere agba pastel na ọdịiche obere.

items.title: Ókè gburugburu koodu
items.description: Debe oghere efu gburugburu koodu. Etinyela akụkụ onyonyo ndị ọzọ n'ebe dị nso — ókè gburugburu dị mkpa maka inyocha nke ọma.

items.title: Nnwale
items.description: Tupu ibipụta ọtụtụ, nwalee koodu na ekwentị dị iche iche na n'ọnọdụ ìhè dị iche iche.

items.title: Ọkwa ndozi
items.description: Maka ibipụta n'èzí na ihe na-abụkarị merenụ ihe, họrọ ọkwa Q ma ọ bụ H.

contentBlocks.title: Gịnị mere onye emepụta koodu QR a ji dị iche?

items.title: Ịmepụta n'ime ihe nchọgharị
items.description: Data etinyere na onye emepụta a naghị eziga ya gaa sava ọ bụla — nhazi niile na-eme n'ime ngwaọrụ gị.

items.title: Ụdị data ise n'otu ngwa ọrụ
items.description: URL, ederede, kaadị azụmaahịa vCard, email, na ekwentị — ụdị ọ bụla na-emepụta koodu QR na usoro ntọala kwesịrị ekwesị.

items.title: Ịdozi ọdịdị koodu QR
items.description: Agba koodu na ndabere, nha na pixel, ókè gburugburu, na ọkwa ndozi njehie — a nwere ike ịdozi nkọwa ọ bụla.

items.title: Ọkwa ndozi njehie anọ
items.description: Algorithm Reed-Solomon na-enye gị ohere ịhọrọ ịdịgide koodu megide mmebi — site na 7% (L) ruo 30% (H). Ọkwa dị elu bara uru maka ibipụta na ihe na-abụkarị dị unyi.

items.title: Nlele n'oge ezigbo oge
items.description: Ị na-ahụ nsorita ozugbo mgbe itinyechara data, na-enweghị ịpị "Mepụta".

items.title: Ibupụ PNG na SVG
items.description: Budata koodu na usoro kwesịrị ekwesị maka ojiji gị.

contentBlocks.title: Ajụjụ a na-ajụkarị gbasara onye emepụta koodu QR

items.question: Koodu QR emepụtara site na ngwa ọrụ a ọ na-agwụ ike?
items.answer: Mba. Koodu QR siri ike (dịka ụdị nke ngwa ọrụ a na-emepụta) anaghị agwụ ike. A na-akwakọba ọdịnaya — dịka ọmụmaatụ, URL ma ọ bụ data kaadị azụmaahịa — ozugbo na koodu. Ọ bụrụ na peeji ahụ a na-elekwasị anya ka nọ, koodu ga-arụ ọrụ.
items.answerSchemaText: Mba. Koodu QR siri ike anaghị agwụ ike. A na-akwakọba ọdịnaya ozugbo na koodu.

items.question: Enwere m ike ịgbanwe URL na koodu QR dị adị?
items.answer: Site na koodu QR siri ike, ị nweghị ike ịgbanwe ọdịnaya akwakọbara — ị chọrọ ịmepụta koodu ọhụrụ nwere adreesị ọhụrụ. Koodu QR a nwere ike ịgbanwe (nke a pụrụ ịdozi mgbe emepụtachara) chọrọ ọrụ mpụga akwụ ụgwọ.
items.answerSchemaText: Mba, enweghi ike ịdozi koodu QR siri ike. Mepụta koodu ọhụrụ maka URL ọhụrụ.

items.question: PNG ma ọ bụ SVG — usoro koodu QR ole ka m ga-ahọrọ maka ibipụta?
items.answer: PNG na-arụ ọrụ maka ọtụtụ ojiji: weebụsaịtị, mmekọrịta, ibipụta ruo nha A4. SVG dabere na vector — a nwere ike ịgbanwe nha ya gaa nha ọ bụla na-enweghị mfu mma, nke na-eme ka ọ dabara maka ọkọlọtọ, pátákó mgbasa ozi, na nha mgbasa ozi buru ibu.
items.answerSchemaText: PNG maka weebụ na ibipụta nkịtị. SVG maka nha ukwuu na ịgbanwe nha na-enweghị mfu.

items.question: Nha koodu QR ole ka m ga-ahọrọ maka kaadị azụmaahịa?
items.answer: Maka ihe ebipụtara (kaadị azụmaahịa, akwụkwọ mgbasa ozi), koodu kwesịrị ịdị ọ dịkarịa ala 2×2 cm, kachasị mma 3×3 cm. Na onye emepụta, nke a dabara na 300 px na mma ibipụta nkịtị (300 DPI). Maka nha ukwuu (akwụkwọ mgbasa ozi, ọkọlọtọ), họrọ nha ukwuu karịa ma ọ bụ usoro SVG.
items.answerSchemaText: Ọ dịkarịa ala 2×2 cm (300 px na 300 DPI). Kachasị mma 3×3 cm maka kaadị azụmaahịa.

items.question: Enwere m ike itinye logo n'etiti koodu QR?
items.answer: Ngwa ọrụ a akwadoghị itinye logo ozugbo. Ma ị nwere ike ibudata koodu na usoro SVG wee tinye logo n'elu ya na ngwa onyonyo — n'ọnọdụ ahụ, ọ dị mkpa ịtọ ọkwa ndozi njehie dị elu (H) ka koodu pụrụ ịgụ ọ bụrụgodị na akụkụ ya kpuchiri.
items.answerSchemaText: Ọ bụghị ozugbo. Budata SVG wee tinye logo na ngwa onyonyo nwere ndozi njehie H.

items.question: Gịnị mere koodu QR m ji adịghị pụrụ ịnyocha mgbe ebipụtachara?
items.answer: Ihe na-akpatakarị: ọdịiche dị obere n'etiti koodu na ndabere, nha koodu dị obere, enweghị ókè gburugburu koodu, ma ọ bụ mmebi ibipụta. Nwaa imee nha ukwuu karịa, mee ka ọdịiche dị mma karịa, wee bulie ọkwa ndozi njehie (Q ma ọ bụ H).
items.answerSchemaText: Lelee ọdịiche, nha, ókè gburugburu, na ọkwa ndozi njehie.

items.question: Enwere m ike iji koodu QR emepụtara maka azụmaahịa?
items.answer: Ee. Ị nwere ike iji koodu QR emepụtara n'efu n'ọrụ ọ bụla — azụmaahịa na nke abụghị azụmaahịa, na-enweghị oke ikike.
items.answerSchemaText: Ee, na-enweghị oke na ọrụ azụmaahịa na nke abụghị azụmaahịa.

items.question: Gịnị bụ ọdịiche n'etiti kaadị azụmaahịa vCard na koodu QR ederede lasan?
items.answer: Koodu QR vCard nwere data kpọtụrụ na usoro ntọala (aha, ụlọ ọrụ, ekwentị, email, adreesị). Mgbe anyochachara, ekwentị na-enye ohere na-akpaghị aka ịchekwa kọntaktị n'akwụkwọ adreesị. Koodu ederede na-egosi data dịka ederede lasan — na-enweghị uru ichekwa na-akpaghị aka.
items.answerSchemaText: vCard na-echekwa kọntaktị na-akpaghị aka. Koodu QR ederede na-egosi naanị ederede.

contentBlocks.title: Chọpụta ngwa ọrụ n'efu ndị ọzọ
